claim.statement: A malformed checker.timeout_seconds must not crash the runner or certify the claim.
claim.negation_of: a runner that produces no verdict record or certifies malformed checker configuration
claim.scope: one external plugin with a non-numeric timeout

provenance.pipeline: envelope carries a non-numeric timeout; runner emits a fail-closed record before plugin dispatch

one_directional: A malformed timeout can never certify; it produces an explicit fail-closed record.
